---
title: "Foundations"
description: "Equilibrium concepts, information, repeated games, computational complexity — the formal core of game theory."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
150 TUTORIALS
:::

# Foundations

Equilibrium concepts, information, repeated games, computational complexity — the formal core of game theory.
